text.tspan: DISNEY SCREAM
@unhappychoice dumps 290 commits on May 1, breaking the record for a single day in the repo's history
HYPER-CRITICAL
@unhappychoice releases splashboard v1.2.0 with 27 new fetchers and 5 new shapes
CODE BOMB
@unhappychoice adds deariary_* family, now pulling diary entries in under 60s
DEVOPS DELUGE
@unhappychoice pushes 1,500+ lines across multiple repos, including a major tokei refactor
OSHA ALERT
@unhappychoice approves 29 reviews across eight repos, keeping the ecosystem healthy
STORYTIME
@unhappychoice launches the /oss/ showcase, turning the website into an open‑source hub

DISNEY SCREAM
@unhappychoice dumps 290 commits on May 1, breaking the record for a single day in the repo's history
HYPER-CRITICAL
@unhappychoice releases splashboard v1.2.0 with 27 new fetchers and 5 new shapes
CODE BOMB
@unhappychoice adds deariary_* family, now pulling diary entries in under 60s
DEVOPS DELUGE
@unhappychoice pushes 1,500+ lines across multiple repos, including a major tokei refactor
OSHA ALERT
@unhappychoice approves 29 reviews across eight repos, keeping the ecosystem healthy
